name: Rigatoni Con Pomodoro e Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Fresh broccoli, cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the broccoli and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add salt and pepper to taste, then stir in the olive oil.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
5. Cook the rigatoni according to package instructions until al dente.
6. Drain the pasta and add it to the pot with the broccoli sauce.
7. Toss everything together until well combined.
8. Turn off the heat and serve hot.
